descriptionHtml:
Hanse 470E for Sale 2008 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Paid | Fully Equipped

This Hanse 470E for sale 2008 offers a balanced mix of modern design, thoughtful upgrades, and practical features. Owned by a single owner and clearly maintained with care, this yacht is presently available for viewing in the Greece Dodecanese area. Presented in good condition, she stands out for her reliable Yanmar engine, updated sails and rigging, and comfortable living spaces, making her a suitable option for long-distance cruising, liveaboard, or family voyages.

FULLY EQUIPPED (Autopilot, Radar, Solar Panels, Inverter, Generator, Bow Thruster...)

General Specifications:

  • Model: Hanse 470E Owner’s Version
  • Year Built: 2008
  • Registration Year: 2008
  • Location: Greece, Dodecanese
  • Flag: Polish
  • Hull length: 14.19 metres
  • Beam: 4.46 metres
  • Draft: 2.60 metres
  • Displacement: 12,200 kg
  • Maximum speed: 8 knots
  • Cruising speed: 7.5 knots
  • Construction: VTR hull and deckhouse, GRP + teak deck

Engine and Propulsion:

  • Engine: Yanmar 4JH4-T(C)E, 75 HP diesel
  • Engine hours: Approx. 3,000
  • Transmission: S-drive (gasket replaced 2024)
  • Propeller: Flex-O-Fold folding three-bladed tiller
  • Annual engine servicing

Deck and Exterior:

  • Teak deck
  • Bimini (2024)
  • Sprayhood
  • Bow thruster (with 4 dedicated bow batteries; overhauled 2022)
  • Electrically operated winch
  • Anchor (80 m stainless steel chain)
  • Catwalk
  • Tender: 2.70 m with Honda 2.3hp outboard
  • Complete cockpit and bow cushions

Sails and Rigging:

  • New main sail (2023)
  • New Bamar furling jib (2022)
  • Lazy bag
  • Rigging replaced (2022)
  • Storm jib and whisk installation (2022)

Interior and Accommodation:

  • Owner’s Version layout
  • Three cabins with wooden flooring
  • Two bathrooms (toilets with replaced pump in 2023)
  • Dinette with foldable, transformable table
  • Gas stove and oven (new 2024)
  • Microwave
  • Fridge plus separate icebox
  • Wastewater system with purification
  • Hot and cold air conditioning
  • Webasto heating
  • 12V and 220V internal sockets

Plumbing and Utilities:

  • Water tanks: Total 700 litres (additional tank installed 2022)
  • Boiler: Electric and engine powered
  • Autoclave present
  • No desalination plant

Electrical and Electronics:

  • Voltage: 12–220 V
  • Batteries: Four AGM Victron (2021)
  • Solar panels (Solbian, installed 2021)
  • Battery charger and inverter
  • Generator: Panda 3.5kW (to be overhauled)
  • Stereo radio, speakers
  • GPS plotter
  • Autopilot (Simrad; display replaced 2024)
  • Radar and antenna
  • Echo sounder
  • VHF radio
  • Wind station
  • Multidisplay repeater
  • Rudder angle indicator

Recent Maintenance and Upgrades:

  • 2024: Bimini and windlass replaced, sea water pump and engine turbo overhauled, heat exchanger cleaned, S-drive gasket replaced, galley refitted, autopilot display replaced
  • 2023: New mainsail, toilet pump replaced
  • 2022: Rigging and engine mounts replaced, new furling jib installed, additional water tank added, bow thruster serviced, storm jib installed
  • 2021: Solar panel and AGM battery system installed

Safety:

  • Safety equipment for sailing within 12 miles (liferaft to be renewed)

The Hanse 470E for sale 2008 is keenly maintained by its single owner and presents a practical, comfortable platform ready for her next chapter. For further details or to arrange an inspection, please contact us. Trade-ins are considered.
